title: STC-1 Passaging and PD Associated Microbe Stimulation Protocol
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"a3lpp","text":"STC-1 Passaging and PD Associated Microbe Stimulation Protocol","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"dgbg9","text":"Complete Medium","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"52nfa","text":"DMEM, high glucose, no glutamine","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"23fv4","text":"4mM L-glutamine","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"2d0ie","text":"1mM sodium pyruvate","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"7c2b4","text":"5% FBS","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"5t66u","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"7h02c","text":"Other Reagents","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"f4tqt","text":"0.05% Trypsin-EDTA","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"8qf8i","text":"1X D-PBS without calcium and magnesium","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"4nko0","text":"75cm2 Flask","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"2h997","text":"12 well plates","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Cells are passaged when they reach approximately 70% confluence Warm trypsin, 1XPBS, and complete medium in water bath for 15 min.
Add 3mL Trypsin to flask. Place flask back into 37°C/5% CO2 incubator for 7 minutes.
Observe cells under microscope to ensure they have detached from the bottom of the flask. a. These cells are particularly sticky, so giving them a nice tap may be necessary to detach them.
Add 9mL of complete medium to flask and transfer cell suspension to a 15mL tube.
Aspirate off supernatant and resuspend cell pellet in 1mL culture medium.
Prepare cell suspension at a concentration of 3x105 cells/mL
Add 1mL cell suspension per well in 12 well plate(s)
For PD associated microbe stimulation, allow cells to rest for approximately 24 hours,
Treat STC-1s with 10 colony forming units (CFU) of PD associated microbe per STC-1 cell
Incubate for desired time and then collect conditioned media and/or cells for downstream analyses
Following plating, allow cells to rest for 24 hours
Treat cells with 10ng/mL LPS for 24 hours
24 hr after LPS treatment, stimulate cells with 10 CFU of PD associated microbes per STC-1 cell
Incubate for desired time and then collect conditioned media and/or cells for downstream analyses
creator: Senthilkumar Karuppagounder
